IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_FHI_aph_AlternatePhones')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [ODS].[LP_FHI_aph_AlternatePhones]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO


CREATE TABLE [ODS].[LP_FHI_aph_AlternatePhones]
(	[Id] 					BIGINT NULL,
	[cst_id] 				BIGINT NULL,
	[Phone] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[pnt_id] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[CallMorning] 			INT NULL,
	[CallAfternoon] 		INT NULL,
	[CallEvening] 			INT NULL,
	[CallWeekend] 			INT NULL,
	[dnc_id] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[intdnc] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)

GO
